ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "club1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first club participating in the match */,
  "club2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second club participating in the match */,
  "team_1_home" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the first club is playing at home (1 for home, 0 for away) */,
  "team_2_home" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the second club is playing at home (1 for home, 0 for away) */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* ID of the winning club (1 for club1, 0 for club2) */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport (e.g., football, basketball) */,
  "league" TEXT /* League or tournament (e.g., Premier League, NBA) */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round or stage of the tournament (e.g., Group Stage, Final) */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name or ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_club1_id FOREIGN KEY ("club1_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_club2_id FOREIGN KEY ("club2_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the club was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the club's home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the club's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the club's official website */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the club */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Club's social media handles */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current coach of the club */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistic entry */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistics belong to */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the statistics belong to */,
  "avg_goals" REAL /* Average number of goals scored per match */,
  "avg_assists" REAL /* Average number of assists per match */,
  "avg_shots" REAL /* Average number of shots taken per match */,
  "avg_shots_on_target" REAL /* Average number of shots on target per match */,
  "avg_saves" REAL /* Average number of saves made per match */,
  "possession" REAL /* Average possession percentage */,
  "fouls" REAL /* Average number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" REAL /* Average number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" REAL /* Average number of red cards */,
  "corners" REAL /* Average number of corners */,
  "offsides" REAL /* Average number of offside incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, public) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the match data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the match data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used for access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the performance belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season or time period the performance is tracked for */,
  "total_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins */,
  "total_losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses */,
  "total_draws" INTEGER /* Total number of draws */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total number of goals scored */,
  "total_goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total number of goals conceded */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the club in the season */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals scored - goals conceded) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of matches where the club did not concede any goals */,
  "biggest_win" TEXT /* Biggest win in terms of goal difference */,
  "biggest_loss" TEXT /* Biggest loss in terms of goal difference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_performance_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the event belongs to */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, substitution, yellow card) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the match when the event occurred */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club involved in the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event */,
  "assistant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant player (e.g., for assists) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score at the time of the event */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of a video clip of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
